claimText: The United Nations was established in 1945 with its Charter signed in San Francisco.
evidenceExcerpt: Established in 1945 with the UN Charter signed in San Francisco; HQ is in New York.
examUse: Statement-based question on the founding of the UN.

claimText: India is a founding member of the United Nations.
evidenceExcerpt: Membership stands at 193 countries; India is a founding member.
examUse: Statement-based question on India's association with the UN.
distractorHooks: India joined the UN in 1947 after independence
India is not a founding member

claimText: States are admitted to UN membership by a decision of the General Assembly upon the recommendation of the Security Council.
evidenceExcerpt: States are admitted to membership by a decision of the General Assembly upon the recommendation of the Security Council.
examUse: Statement-based question on the admission process for new UN members.
distractorHooks: Admission is decided solely by the UNGA
Admission is decided by the UNSC upon UNGA recommendation
Admission requires a unanimous vote in the UNGA

claimText: The Trusteeship Council, one of the six main organs of the UN, has been inactive since 1994.
evidenceExcerpt: Six main organs: UNGA, UNSC (15 members), ECOSOC (54 members), ICJ (The Hague), Trusteeship Council (inactive since 1994), and Secretariat.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying active versus inactive UN organs.
distractorHooks: Trusteeship Council was permanently abolished in 1994

claimText: The International Court of Justice (ICJ) is one of the six main organs of the UN and is headquartered in The Hague.
evidenceExcerpt: Six main organs: UNGA, UNSC (15 members), ECOSOC (54 members), ICJ (The Hague), Trusteeship Council (inactive since 1994), and Secretariat.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching UN organs to their headquarters.
distractorHooks: ICJ is headquartered in New York
ICJ is a specialized agency, not a main organ

claimText: The UN Economic and Social Council (ECOSOC) consists of 54 members.
evidenceExcerpt: Six main organs: UNGA, UNSC (15 members), ECOSOC (54 members)
examUse: Statement-based question on the composition of UN organs.
distractorHooks: All 193 UN member states are part of ECOSOC
